verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: By the sky and the night comer -
verse.verse_2: And what can make you know what is the night comer?
verse.verse_4: There is no soul but that it has over it a protector.
verse.verse_5: So let man observe from what he was created.
verse.verse_6: He was created from a fluid, ejected,
verse.verse_7: Emerging from between the backbone and the ribs.
verse.verse_8: Indeed, Allah, to return him [to life], is Able.
verse.verse_9: The Day when secrets will be put on trial,
verse.verse_10: Then man will have no power or any helper.
verse.verse_12: And [by] the earth which cracks open,
verse.verse_13: Indeed, the Qur'an is a decisive statement,
verse.verse_15: Indeed, they are planning a plan,
verse.verse_16: But I am planning a plan.
verse.verse_17: So allow time for the disbelievers. Leave them awhile.
